user.title: OBDcast Setup
user.description: Choose how your OBDcast device will send telemetry data to Home Assistant.

mqtt.title: MQTT Configuration
mqtt.description: Configure MQTT transport for your OBDcast device. Requires HA MQTT integration to be set up.

data_description.vehicle_name: Friendly name for this vehicle (e.g. 'Tesla', 'Family Car')
data_description.device_id: Must match the Device ID set in OBDcast firmware

webhook.title: Webhook Configuration
webhook.description: Configure webhook transport. A unique webhook URL will be generated for your device.

data_description.vehicle_name: Friendly name for this vehicle (e.g. 'Tesla', 'Family Car')
data_description.device_id: Must match the Device ID set in OBDcast firmware
data_description.webhook_hmac_secret: Copy from WEBHOOK_HMAC_SECRET in your OBDcast firmware config.h. Leave blank to disable signature verification.
data_description.webhook_hmac_enabled: When enabled, webhook requests without a valid HMAC-SHA256 signature will be rejected.

error.already_configured: This device ID is already configured.
